1.title: Learn by Watching
1.description: Discover sentences from your favorite movies and series. See how they are spoken naturally in context.

2.title: AI Dictionary
2.description: Not just Turkish translations. Analyze metaphors, idioms, and usage patterns in sentences with AI.

3.title: Smart Word Pool
3.description: Filter thousands of words to fit your level (A1-C2). Focus only on what you don't know.

4.title: Permanent Memory
4.description: Never forget words you learn with the Spaced Repetition method.

learnt.title: Learnt Words
learnt.emptyDesc: Start learning by adding words to your lists!

studied.title: Studied Words
studied.emptyDesc: Fill this list by solving word quizzes!

due.title: Due for Review
due.emptyDesc: You have no words to review for today.

difficult.title: Difficult Words
difficult.emptyDesc: You haven't practiced enough to mark words as 'difficult' yet. As you solve quizzes, the system will collect the ones that challenge you here.
